[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile game profile screen is shown with a dark blue theme, featuring a stylized character portrait, username and stats, rank emblems, badge icons, and a row of featured images along the bottom.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a game profile UI layout with a large character artwork on the right and multiple rank and achievement badges arranged across the center and lower half of the screen.

Setting:
The image is indoors in the sense that it is clearly a digital user interface screenshot, with no real-world environment visible. Lighting and weather are not applicable because it is a screen capture.

Visual Details:
The background is a smooth gradient of blue and dark tones with decorative highlights and glow effects. At the top left, a watermark-like text “WinkFIL” appears. Near the top center-left, a small rectangular thumbnail with a black-and-white image is shown next to text. To the right of the thumbnail area, white text includes “keicyy.” followed by a line with multiple heart/face-like emojis and an “ID:” value. Under that, small icon-style counters are displayed, including a blue gem-like icon with the number “33,” a pink icon with a symbol that looks like a female sign, and a circular icon showing red, white, and blue colors. A small name line reads “Tanah Serei a1 Kagu ra” (the exact middle characters are slightly unclear due to blur), followed by another line that includes a sparkle-like symbol and the text “starri esr t” (the exact spacing is unclear). On the left-middle, a large golden emblem sits above the text “Rank Saat Ini.” On the right-middle, a similar emblem in gold with blue highlights appears above the text “Rank Tertinggi” with the number “30” near the emblem. Two larger orange and gold badge icons appear in the lower middle area with the labels “Man of Steel” and “Hand Over Fist” beneath them. At the bottom left, three small circular character/avatar images are shown side-by-side, followed by a large white play or fast-forward style icon near the middle-left. Along the bottom, there is a text label “Pengunjung Terakhir,” and next to it are three small square thumbnail images. A partial line of text “Total P” is visible at the bottom right, but the remainder is unclear. The camera angle is straight-on and the composition is a typical vertically oriented phone UI screenshot.

Visible Text:
WinkFIL
keicyy.
ID: 1

33
Tanah Serei a1 Kagu ra
starri esr t

Practical Summary:
This image shows a mobile game profile UI with a stylized character portrait and multiple rank and achievement badges. It also includes username and stats text, several icons, and a section labeled “Pengunjung Terakhir” with three thumbnail images.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
